hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then cd /Users/paul/Project/ccas/backend && uv run ruff check && uv run ruff format --check; fi
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /Users/paul/Project/ccas/frontend && pnpm tsc --noEmit; fi
